headline: 3 Reasons to Add NetApp Stock to Your Watchlist Now (Hint: Shares Are Undervalued Here)
summary: One of only four stocks with a standard deviation higher than 4.00 on Friday, the data management software company’s stock jumped over 12%. Given current stock valuations, it still seems cheap. Here are three reasons why.

headline: NetApp Stock Rallies Ahead Of Earnings As Data Storage Rival Everpure Chases Breakout
summary: Shares of rival data storage firms NetApp and Everpure are rallying ahead of earnings reports due Thursday.  NetApp stock broke out during Friday's session while shares of Everpure, formerly Pure Storage, are approaching an entry with early gains Tuesday.  For Everpure and NetApp, the picture has been more complicated.

headline: NetApp to Release Q4 Earnings: Here's What Investors Should Expect
summary: NTAP heads into Q4 earnings with AI, cloud and all-flash storage demand boosting growth as margin pressure from rising memory costs lingers.
